hero.title: Stop collecting data by hand.
hero.subtitle: MetriqFlow turns your Telegram and VK numbers into clear insights, competitor benchmarks and ready-to-send reports — so you spend your time creating, not counting.

platforms.title: The platforms you really use
platforms.subtitle: Two live today, three on the way. Your whole social footprint, one dashboard.

showcase.title: Everything you need to grow, in one place
showcase.subtitle: MetriqFlow connects your numbers to the strategy that grows your business.

analytics.title: See every metric that matters
analytics.desc: Followers, reach, engagement and per-post performance across all your channels — in one fast dashboard. No spreadsheets, no manual exports.
points: Light & dark, built for long sessions

insights.title: Helps you decide what to do next
insights.desc: MetriqFlow reads your data and surfaces plain-language recommendations: when to post, what's working, and where you're quietly losing reach.
points: Best time to post, backed by your data
Catch drops before they cost you

competitors.title: Benchmark against anyone
competitors.desc: Track competitor channels side by side. See who's growing faster and reverse-engineer the content that actually works.
points: Growth & engagement gaps at a glance

planner.title: Plan and schedule in one calendar
planner.desc: Draft posts, pick the best time and keep your whole content pipeline in a single calendar your team can see.

reports.title: Reports your clients will love
reports.desc: Generate CSV, PDF or XML reports on a schedule and deliver them automatically. Zero manual work, every single week.

connect.title: Connect your channels
connect.desc: Link Telegram or VK in a couple of clicks. No code, no API keys to wrangle.

analyze.title: We crunch the numbers
analyze.desc: MetriqFlow pulls your history and keeps everything in sync automatically.

grow.title: Act on clear insights
grow.desc: Read your dashboard, follow the recommendations and watch your channels grow.

cta.title: Ready to boost your reach and productivity?
cta.subtitle: Turn your social numbers into strategy. Start free today.

step2.title: Complete your profile
step2.subtitle: Tell us about yourself

errors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.passwordUppercase: Must contain at least one uppercase letter
errors.passwordSpecial: Must contain at least one special character

onboarding.title: Getting started
onboarding.subtitle: Complete a few steps to finish setting up
onboarding.allDoneDesc: Your account is fully configured and ready to go.
onboarding.step1Desc: Add the analytics bot to your channel in the Integrations section
onboarding.step2Desc: Connect a public VK community to collect analytics
onboarding.step3Desc: Generate a CSV, PDF or XML report from your data
onboarding.step4Desc: Receive reports on a schedule to Telegram or email

Schedules.title: Automatic reports
Schedules.subtitle: Scheduled delivery to Telegram or email
Schedules.emptyHint: Create a schedule and get reports delivered automatically
Schedules.noChannelWarning: Select at least one delivery channel

Reports.title: Reports
Reports.emptyHint: Create your first report from the Analytics tab
Reports.exportLocked: PDF export available on Pro and higher

Integrations.title: Integrations
Integrations.telegramDesc: Connect channels and collect post analytics.
Integrations.vkDesc: Add your VK communities to track analytics
Integrations.vkGuideStep1: Enter the link or ID of a public VK community and click «Connect».
Integrations.vkPublicNote: Public post analytics is collected: views, likes, comments, reposts. VK's internal stats (reach, visitors, demographics) are unavailable — VK closed that access for external apps.
Integrations.vkErrPrivate: This is a private community. Analytics is available for public communities only.
Integrations.vkErrGroupNotFound: Community not found. Check the link or ID.
Integrations.vkAddError: Could not connect the community. Check the link or ID.
Integrations.connectError: Could not connect Telegram. Please try again.

Analytics.title: Analytics
Analytics.combinedHint: Comparable metrics only. Reach is not shown — VK does not expose it for external apps.
Analytics.allTabHint: For detailed analytics, switch to a specific platform tab.
Analytics.noChannelsDesc: Go to Integrations → connect Telegram, then add the bot as admin to your channel.
Analytics.newChannelBannerDesc: The bot has just been added to this channel and is now collecting data.
Analytics.heatmapHint: Colour = avg views. Darker = better time to post.
Analytics.historyCapped: Free plan: history limited to 30 days

aiInsights.title: AI Insights
aiInsights.description: Get personalized recommendations based on channel statistics.
aiInsights.upgradeRequired: AI Insights are available on paid plans.
aiInsights.quotaExceeded: Daily AI generation limit reached. Try again tomorrow.
aiInsights.dataLow: Based on a small number of posts ({count}) — these conclusions are preliminary.
aiInsights.dataLowNudge: Switch to the 7d or 30d period for a more reliable analysis.

VKAnalytics.title: VK Analytics
VKAnalytics.noCommunitiesDesc: Go to Integrations → connect VK to see your communities.
VKAnalytics.heatmapHint: Colour = avg views. Darker = better time to post.
VKAnalytics.historyCapped: Free plan: history limited to 30 days
VKAnalytics.tokenInvalid: The saved token no longer works. Remove the community in Integrations and add it again with a new user token.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.deleteDescription: This action is irreversible. We will send a confirmation email.
danger.emailSent: Email sent. Check your inbox and click the link.
danger.confirmDeleteDescription: All data will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

delete.title: Delete account
delete.description: Once deleted, all your data will be lost forever. This action cannot be undone.
delete.confirmText: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
delete.confirmHint: We will send a confirmation email to:

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Weekly engagement alerts for your channels.

VerifyEmail.title: Verify your email
VerifyEmail.subtitle: We sent a verification link to:
VerifyEmail.hint: Click the link in the email to activate your account.
VerifyEmail.resendError: Failed to send. Please try again later.
VerifyEmail.errorSubtitle: The link has expired or was already used. Request a new one.

DeleteConfirm.title: Confirm account deletion
DeleteConfirm.subtitle: Click the button below to permanently delete your account and all data. This cannot be undone.
DeleteConfirm.doneSubtitle: All your data has been removed. Redirecting to login...
DeleteConfirm.errorText: The link is invalid or has expired.

Billing.title: Billing
Billing.subtitle: Choose a plan for your account
Billing.freePlanNote: Start for free — upgrade when you're ready
Billing.upgradeDesc: Upgrade to Pro or Agency to remove limits
Billing.paymentNote: Payment will be available soon. Contact us: support@metriqflow.com
Billing.promoDesc: Have a promo code? Enter it below to activate your plan.
Billing.promoAlready: This code has already been applied to your account.
Billing.promoError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.desc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
notFound.dashboardDesc: This page doesn't exist in the dashboard.

Competitors.title: Competitor Analysis
Competitors.addError: Could not add. Check the username or ID.
Competitors.limitReached: You have reached the competitor limit for your plan.
Competitors.emptyDesc: Add a public Telegram channel or VK community to compare.
Competitors.noOwnTg: No Telegram channels connected. Connect one in Integrations.

ContentPlanner.title: Content Planner
ContentPlanner.noChannels: No channels connected. Add a Telegram or VK integration.
ContentPlanner.noPosts: No scheduled posts yet. Create your first!
ContentPlanner.bestTimeHint: Based on views data over last 90 days
ContentPlanner.bestTimeNotEnough: Not enough data for a recommendation

PostsSearch.title: Post Search

PostsSearch.noResults: No posts found. Try adjusting the filters.
PostsSearch.noCommunitiesHint: No VK communities connected. Add an integration.
PostsSearch.vkNote: VK: searching across the last 100 posts in this community.
